calendar.matters:
Verified Petition To Determine Title To Real Property And Require Transfer And Conveyance To Trust
Off Calendar Nov-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Frank G. Adam, Esq. appearing in person for and with Jeanette C. Bolanos, Trustee;
Jeanette C. Bolanos, Trustee, also appearing in person;
Brian Affrunti, Esq. appearing via Zoom for Alberto Bolanos, Beneficiary;
No other appearance by any party or counsel.

The Court stated that other San Francisco Superior Court judge's had declined to hear this matter, briefly noted the reason why, and stated that it would be proceeding with the petition before it today. The Court stated that Suzanne Bolanos is not part of this matter.

The Court explained in detail that it is looking for something that would be based on "information and belief" which would support the idea that this home belongs in the trust. Mr. Adam's stated that his client could provide an answer for the Court. Jeanette Bolanos stated that it was always Carolyn Bolanos' intent to put the home in the trust, that it was an "ADU", and that this was going to be Carolyn Bolanos' new home. The Court addressed Ms. Bolanos inquiring if asked to do so if she would be willing to submit her statements in writing via a declaration. Ms. Bolanos stated that she would be willing to submit a declaration. Mr. Affrunti stated that the proceeds from the Millbrae property were used to purchase the home in Santa Rosa.

At the conclusion of comments, the Court took the Amended Verified Petition to Determine Title to Real Property and Require Transfer and Conveyance to Trust under submission with the intent to grant. Mr. Adams was directed to provide a new proposed order to the probate examiner.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: R. Cabrera. Matter not reported.

Verified Petition To Change Venue
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Denied

Verified Petition To Require Annual Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marc Seidenfeld for and with Carolyn Bolanos
Brian Affrunti for and with Alberto Bolanos

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to whether it is appropriate for the Trust to remain in San Francisco or be transferred to San Mateo County, whether or not the Court should order yearly accountings versus biennial accountings, spoke of the Trust history, the Trust assets, the relationship between the Trustee and the Beneficiaries, the level of distrust, lack of communication between the Trustee and the Beneficiaries, concern about the Trustee invading the corpus, and the possibility of providing monthly Ameriprise statements, etc.

Upon conclusion of argument, The Verified Petition to Change Venue and the Verified Petition to require annual accounting are DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Brian Affrunti to submit proposed order for Petition to Change Venue. Marc Seidenfeld to submit proposed order for Petition to Require Annual Accounting.

Judge: Cecilia P. Castellanos. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Feb-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marc Seidenfeld for and with (trustee) Carolyn Bolanos. Brian Affrunti for Alberto Bolanos.

The court stated that we are here for the 2nd amended petition and asked what issues were still pending. Mr. Affrunti stated that the one remaining issue is to characterize the gift. Mr. Seidenfeld stated that no additional pleadings were needed, that there is nothing in the trust saying that the trustee could not make a gift and that she compensated the remaindermen for expenses. Mr. Affrunti cited P.C. 16003 stating that a trustee must treat all equally, that his client was penalized by the distributions to the other beneficiaries and that the distributions were not gifts. The court asked for clarification on the attorney's fees. Mr. Seidenfeld reported that it was an extraordinary year with the litigation and that the fees were justified. The accounting petition was taken under submission with Mr. Seidenfeld to submit a new order containing alternatives regarding the findings or improper distributions.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Approval Of Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marc Seidenfeld for the petitioner Carolyn Bolanos.
Brian Affrunti, Esq. for and with Objector Alberto Bolanos.

Hearing held, counsel presents their arguments on the status of the accounting and discovery to the court. After hearing the arguments, matter is taken under submission for party to file and submit to the court further briefing with case laws in support of their contentions. Briefs shall be filed no later than 3/19/14 and responses due on 3/28/14.

Visiting Judge Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported, (611).

Petition For Approval Of Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Continued To Mar-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marc Seidenfeld for and with petitioner Carolyn Bolanos.
Aldon Bolanos and Brian Affrunti for petitioner Alberto Bolanos.

Counsel states appearances and provide the status of the case to the Court.

Mr. Affrunti informs the Court of pending issues regarding the accounting and the property transfer.

Mr. Seidenfeld presents arguments on the status of accounting.

The Court orders counsel to return on Tuesday, March 4, 2014 at 9:00am for further status and the Hearing on Petition for Approval of Accounting. Any evidence regarding accounting should be submitted a week prior to this date. Settlement conferences will be scheduled after the hearing.

Visiting Judge Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: Rosallie Gumpal, Not reported, (611).

Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Text Ruling

Petition For Approval Of Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Continued To Jan-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marc Seidenfeld for and with petitioner Carolyn Bolanos.
Aldon Bolanos and Brian Affrunti for petitioner Alberto Bolanos.

Counsel states appearances and introduce the case to the Court.

The Court discusses the matter with both parties in her chambers, separately.

After discussion, the parties have agreed as follows:
Petitioner Carolyn Bolanos will provide property appraisals and informal inventory (date of death) to petitioner Alberto Bolanos by January 15, 2014. Mrs. Bolanos stipulates to extend the time for Alberto Bolanos to file a Discovery Motion by January 30, 2014.

The Court orders all parties to return to Dept 611 on January 30, 2014 at 9:00am for further discussion and status.

Visiting Judge O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: Rosallie Gumpal, Not reported. (611)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Continued To Dec-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marc Seidenfeld for and with Carolyn Bolanos and Jeanette Bolanos. Brian Affrunti for Alberto Bolanos.

The Court questioned Armando Jr. not being present. Mr. Affrunti stated that he does not represent Armando Jr., that he will need to obtain clarification as to representation of Armando Jr., and confirmed that Alberto Bolanos is the husband of Judge Bolanos of the San Francisco Superior Court. The Court stated that today's hearing would not be a problem, but that it may be when substantive matters are before the Court. The accounting petition was continued to December 2, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the issue of notice to Armando Jr., the issue fees and the issue of notice to all Beneficiaries to be cleared up.

Judge: Anne Bouliane. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Accounting
Off Calendar May-20-2013 Continued To Jun-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Injunctive Relief, Removal Of Trustee, Appointment Of Successor Trustee, Accounting And Surcharge
Off Calendar Apr-15-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Seidenfeld for and with Caroline Bolanos (Respondent). Aldon Bolanos for Alberto Bolanos.

Aldon Bolanos waives notice on behalf of his client Alberto Bolanos and represented to the Court that he represents Armando Bolanos Jr. and waives notice of the Petition on his behalf as well. Mr. Seidenfeld represented to the Court that he represents Jeanette Bolanos and waives notice of the Petition on her behalf. The Court stated that the survivors trust is revocable and does not require an accounting, and that the by pass trust has remainder beneficiaries and should have an accounting. Mr. Bolanos stated that the accounting that was provided to him was incomplete and that property was missing. The Court denied the requests for injunctive relief, removal of Trustee, appointment of successor Trustee, and surcharge. Status on filing of an accounting was set for May 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
